summary: The Election Commission has announced the process for holding the Vice-President election, following former V-P Jagdeep Dhankhar's sudden resignation. Various names are being floated as potential candidates.

theme: Justice Yashwant Varma and Supreme Court Developments
summary: Chief Justice B.R. Gavai has recused himself from hearing a plea filed by Justice Yashwant Varma, who is challenging the findings of an in-house Supreme Court committee report. A new bench will hear the petition.

Prime Minister Narendra Modi bid farewell to former Vice-President Jagdeep Dhankhar, while Proton launched an AI assistant called Lumo. Infosys announced its Q1FY26 financial results, with a rise in voluntary attrition rate.

theme: Supreme Court Ruling on Ex-parte Gag Order
summary: The Supreme Court refused to entertain a direct challenge to an ex-parte gag order restraining media from publishing defamatory content regarding the Sri Manjunathaswamy temple and the 'Dharmasthala Burial' case.
